description: The Bandidos Motorcycle Club is an outlaw motorcycle gang classified as a criminal organization by law enforcement in multiple countries. Founded in 1966 in San Leon, Texas, the club has chapters worldwide, including Australia where it was established in 1983. Members have been convicted of theft, extortion, drug trafficking, and murder. The Australian Bandidos have around 400 members and 45 chapters, and are involved in ongoing conflicts with rival clubs.

country_links.evidence_quote: Australia's first Bandidos chapter was formed in Sydney in August 1983. The club has around 400 members and 45 chapters in the country...
country_links.context: The Bandidos have chapters, members, and operations in Australia, including drug trafficking and violent conflicts.

country_links.evidence_quote: Bogdan Cuic, a member of the Bandidos' 'West End' chapter in Brisbane, fled to Serbia after shooting and killing Jei 'Jack' Lee...
country_links.context: A Bandidos member fled to Serbia after a killing, and was later extradited from there.
